name: uistats-typescript
description: A tiny ui component to display app stats.

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run webpack && npm run copy-src-to-dist
scripts.build-dev: npm run compile && npm run webpack && npm run copy-src-to-dist-dev
scripts.compile: npm run compile:cjs && npm run compile:esm
scripts.compile:cjs: tsc -p tsconfig.json --target es5 --module commonjs --outDir src/cjs/ && npm run copy-src-to-dist
scripts.compile:esm: tsc -p tsconfig.json --target ES2015 --module ESNext --outdir src/esm/ --moduleResolution node
scripts.webpack: npm run webpack:dev && npm run webpack:prod
scripts.copy-src-to-dist: cp dist/uistats-typescript-main.js dist/uistats.js && cp dist/uistats-typescript-main.js.map dist/uistats.js.map && cp dist/uistats-typescript-main.min.js dist/uistats.min.js && cp dist/uistats-typescript-main.min.js.map dist/uistats.min.js.map
scripts.__build: npm run compile-typescript && npm run rollup && npm run webpack
scripts.__build-dev: npm run compile-typescript && npm run rollup

author: Ikaros Kappler <info@int2byte.de>
